sectionTitle: I'm Staying in the Hospital | 我住院了

items.en: to stay in the hospital; to be hospitalized

samples.pinyin: wǒ zhùyuànle.
samples.en: I’m in the hospital.

samples.pinyin: tā zhùyuàn liǎng tiānle.
samples.en: She has been hospitalized for two days.

samples.pinyin: tā yǒuyī zhāng piàoliang de liǎn.
samples.en: She has a beautiful face.
samples.vi: Cô ấy có một khuôn mặt xinh đẹp.

samples.pinyin: tā de liǎn yuán yuán de.
samples.en: His face is round.
samples.vi: Mặt của anh ấy tròn tròn.

samples.meaning: be injured; be wounded; sustain an injury
samples.pinyin: tā zài bǐsài zhōng shòushāngle.
samples.en: He got injured during the game.
samples.vi: Anh ấy bị thương trong trận đấu.

samples.meaning: be injured; be wounded; sustain an injury
samples.pinyin: tā de shǒuwàn shòushāngle.
samples.en: His wrist was injured.

samples.meaning: bump against; run into; strike; collide
samples.pinyin: bié ràng qìchē zhuàng shàng.
samples.en: Don't let the car hit.
samples.vi: Đừng để ô tô đụng phải

samples.meaning: bump against; run into; strike; collide
samples.pinyin: liǎng gèrén zhuàngle gè mǎnhuái.
samples.en: The two people bumped into each other.
samples.vi: Hai người chạm trán nhau.

samples.meaning: obey; observe; abide by; comply with
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào zūnshǒu fǎlǜ.
samples.en: We must obey the law.

samples.meaning: obey; observe; abide by; comply with
samples.pinyin: tā tèbié zūnshǒu shíjiān.
samples.en: He is very punctual.

samples.sentence: 足球比賽有明確的規則。
samples.pinyin: zúqiú bǐsài yǒu míngquè de guīzé.
samples.en: The soccer game has clear rules.
samples.vi: Trận đấu bóng đá có luật rõ ràng.

samples.sentence: 我們要遵守交通的規則。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào zūnshǒu jiāotōng de guīzé.
samples.en: We must follow the traffic rules.

samples.sentence: 工人們把鮮花擺放得很規則。
samples.pinyin: gōngrénmen bǎ xiānhuā bǎi fàng de hěn guīzé.
samples.en: The workers arranged the flowers in an orderly way.

samples.sentence: 這件衣服的圖案不太規則。
samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfu de tú'àn bù tài guīzé.
samples.en: The pattern on this shirt is not very regular.

items.en: to report to the police; to call the police

samples.pinyin: tā de jiārén yǐjīng bàojǐng.
samples.en: Her family has called the police.

samples.pinyin: yù dào wéixiǎn yào gǎnjǐn bàojǐng.
samples.en: When facing danger, call the police immediately.
samples.vi: Gặp nguy hiểm cần phải nhanh chóng báo cảnh sát.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yàojìn jízhěnshì
samples.en: We're going to the emergency room.

samples.pinyin: jízhěn shì lǐ zuò mǎnle rén.
samples.en: The emergency room is full of people.

samples.meaning: suffer a fracture; break (of a bone)
samples.pinyin: tā de tuǐ gǔzhéle.
samples.en: Her leg is fractured.

samples.meaning: suffer a fracture; break (of a bone)
samples.pinyin: tā bù xiǎoxīn shuāi gǔzhéle.
samples.en: She accidentally fell and broke a bone.

samples.meaning: X-ray image; negative of a roentgenogram
samples.sentence: 醫院已經處理好片子了。
samples.pinyin: Yī yuàn yǐjīng chǔ lǐ hǎo piānzi le.
samples.en: The hospital has processed the film.

samples.meaning: X-ray image; negative of a roentgenogram
samples.sentence: 看片子需要專業的醫生。
samples.pinyin: Kàn piānzi xū yào zhuānyè de yī shēng.
samples.en: Watching the film requires a professional doctor.

samples.pinyin: kāidāo wèn zhǎn
samples.en: Execute by decapitation

samples.meaning: perform (or have) an operation; operate or be operated on
samples.pinyin: gěi bìngrén kāidāo
samples.en: Operate on a patient

samples.sentence: 醫生説這位病人已經完全康復。
samples.pinyin: yīshēng shuō zhè wèi bìngrén yǐjīng wánquán kāngfù.
samples.en: The doctor reported the patient fully recovered.

samples.sentence: 我們很多病人都有失禁現象。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen hěnduō bìngrén dōu yǒu shījìn xiànxiàng.
samples.en: Many of our patients are incontinent.

samples.meaning: condition; situation; circumstances; state of affairs
samples.sentence: 醫生檢查了病人的情況。
samples.pinyin: yīshēng jiǎnchále bìngrén de qíngkuàng.
samples.en: The doctor examined the patient’s condition
samples.vi: Bác sĩ đã kiểm tra tình trạng của bệnh nhân.

samples.meaning: condition; situation; circumstances; state of affairs
samples.sentence: 現在的政治情況很復雜。
samples.pinyin: xiànzài de zhèngzhì qíngkuàng hěn fùzá.
samples.en: The current political situation is very complicated.
samples.vi: Tình hình chính trị hiện nay rất phức tạp.

samples.sentence: 他接到了一個緊急電話。
samples.pinyin: tā jiē dàole yī gè jǐnjí diànhuà.
samples.en: He received an urgent call.
samples.vi: Anh nhận được một cuộc gọi khẩn cấp.

samples.pinyin: zhè zhǒng qíngkuàng děi jǐnjí chǔlǐ.
samples.en: This condition requires urgent treatment.

samples.sentence: 這所醫院有三百張病床/牀。
samples.pinyin: zhè suǒ yīyuàn yǒu sān bǎi zhāng bìngchuáng.
samples.en: The hospital has three hundred beds.

samples.sentence: 他昏迷不醒地躺在病床/牀上。
samples.pinyin: tā hūnmí bù xǐng de tǎng zài bìngchuáng shàng.
samples.en: He lay in a coma on the hospital bed.

items.vi: khủng khiếp; đến chết đi được

samples.meaning: kill; drive sb. to his death
samples.sentence: 吃/喫這種有毒的蘑菇會要命。
samples.pinyin: chī zhè zhǒng yǒudú de mógū huì yàomìng.
samples.en: Eating this poisonous mushroom could be fatal.

samples.meaning: kill; drive sb. to his death
samples.pinyin: tā yīn xīdú guòliàng ér yàomìng.
samples.en: He nearly died from a drug overdose.

samples.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān yào qù dǎzhēn.
samples.en: I am going to get an injection today.

samples.pinyin: dǎzhēn hòu yào zhùyì xiūxi.
samples.en: You should rest after getting an injection.

samples.pinyin: Yīshēng gěi wǒ zhǐ tòng yào liǎng piàn.
samples.en: The doctor gave me two painkillers.

samples.pinyin: shì zhǐtòng fārè xiàngxiáo tiē
samples.en: It's analgesic heat rub.

samples.pinyin: tā xūyào jìnxíng shǒushù.
samples.en: He needs to undergo surgery.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì yī xiàng fùzá de shǒushù.
samples.en: This is a complicated operation.

samples.pinyin: yīshēng zhèngzài shǒushù bìngrén.
samples.en: The doctor is performing surgery on the patient.

samples.sentence: 醫生將在明天為他手術。
samples.pinyin: yīshēng jiàng zài míngtiān wèi tā shǒushù.
samples.en: The doctor will perform surgery on him tomorrow.

samples.pinyin: tā xiǎng chéngwéi yī míng jǐngchá.
samples.en: He wants to be a police officer.

samples.pinyin: jǐngchá huì bǎohù shìmín ānquán.
samples.en: The police will protect citizens' safety.

samples.pinyin: zhè tiáo lù fēicháng wéixiǎn.
samples.en: This road is very dangerous.

samples.sentence: 他做了一個危險的決定。
samples.pinyin: tā zuòle yīgè wéixiǎn de juédìng.
samples.en: He made a dangerous decision.

samples.meaning: as for; to the extent that
samples.sentence: 你至於生那麼大的氣嗎？
samples.pinyin: nǐ zhìyú shēng nàme dà de qì ma?
samples.en: Are you really that angry?
samples.vi: Cậu tức giận đến nỗi vậy luôn à?

samples.meaning: as for; to the extent that
samples.pinyin: nǎr zhìyú nàme guì ne?
samples.en: Where is it so expensive?
samples.vi: Chỗ nào mà lại đắt tới mức đó chứ?

samples.sentence: 至於他的計劃，我不太了解。
samples.pinyin: zhìyú tā de jìhuà, wǒ bù tài liǎojiě.

samples.sentence: 至於這個問題，我沒有答案。
samples.pinyin: zhìyú zhège wèntí, wǒ méiyǒu dá'àn.
samples.en: Regarding this question, I have no answer.

samples.pinyin: tā de yāobù wèi yǒudiǎn téng.

samples.pinyin: zhè bùwèi xūyào tèbié xiǎoxīn.

samples.sentence: 你的身體還沒有完全恢復。
samples.pinyin: nǐ de shēntǐ hái méiyǒu wánquán huīfù.
samples.en: Your body has not fully recovered.

samples.sentence: 這個工廠又恢復了産生。
samples.pinyin: zhège gōngchǎng yòu huīfùle chǎnshēng.
samples.en: This factory has resumed production.

samples.pinyin: shāngkǒu réng zài liúxiě.
samples.en: The wound is still bleeding.

samples.pinyin: nǐ bùyào pèng shāngkǒu.
samples.en: Don't touch the wound.

samples.sentence: 哎呀，這張畫怎麼弄髒了？
samples.pinyin: āi yā, zhè zhāng huà zěn me nòng zāng le?
samples.en: Oh my! The picture's got dirty!

samples.pinyin: āi yā, zhè zhǒng shuǐ guǒ zhēn tián nǎ!
samples.en: Ah, this fruit is really sweet!

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào zhēnxī shíjiān.

samples.pinyin: duì wǒ lái shuō, shíjiān jiùshì jīnqián.

samples.sentence: 你要早睡，另要好好吃/喫喝。

samples.en: You should sleep early, in addition, eat and drink well.

samples.pinyin: tā xìng lìng.

samples.pinyin: měi gèrén de jiàzhíguān bùtóng.

samples.pinyin: tā de jiàzhíguān hěn chuántǒng.
samples.en: He has very traditional values.

samples.pinyin: tā zūnjìng nàxiē lǎo qiánbèi.
samples.en: She respects those senior predecessors.

samples.pinyin: tā zūnjìng měi yī wèi kèhù.

samples.sentence: 妹妹很崇拜併尊敬她的學長。

samples.sentence: 尊敬的各位嘉賓，大傢晚上好！

samples.pinyin: qǐng nǐ gào wǒmen huìyì jiéguǒ.

samples.sentence: 我們班的平均年齡是25歲。
